title: Sr Software Engineer (ML/NLP/AI - Backend engineer - 4to6yrs - Chennai)
company_focus:
Research and advisory company providing business and
technology insights to enterprise leaders
description:
About the Role:

We are seeking a Senior AI Engineer specializing in backend
and platform development to design, build, and optimize
scalable AI-driven systems. In this role, you will leverage
your expertise in Python, cloud-native services, and machine
learning to architect robust backend solutions and
intelligent platforms. You will work closely with cross-
functional teams to integrate advanced AI models, automate
workflows, and deliver high-impact solutions that drive
business value and operational excellence.

Key Responsibilities:

- Design, develop, and deploy scalable backend systems for AI-
  powered applications using Python and cloud providers
  (AWS, Azure).
- Design and implement Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers to
  enable seamless integration between AI agents, enterprise
  systems, and external tools
- Design and implement APIs and microservices to support
  machine learning workflows, real-time inference, and data
  integration.
- Integrate machine learning and generative AI models (LLMs,
  multimodal models) into backend services and business
  applications.
- Explore and create POC of AI/ML technologies and frameworks
- Setting up best practices for coding standards w.r.t. AI/ML
  applications
- Build and maintain data pipelines, ETL/ELT processes, and
  event-driven architectures to enable seamless data flow
  and model training.
- Develop automation tools and scripts for model lifecycle
  management, monitoring, and continuous
  integration/continuous deployment (CI/CD).
- Collaborate with data scientists, ML engineers, and platform
  teams to deploy, monitor, and optimize AI models in
  production environments.
- Ensure high availability, scalability, and security of
  backend services and AI platforms.
- Research and evaluate emerging AI technologies to drive
  innovation and improve system performance.

Required Qualifications:

- 4 to 6 years of experience with 2+ years of relevant
  experience building conversational AI systems, chatbots,
  LLM applications, or other advanced machine
  learning/artificial intelligence solutions to drive
  business impact
- Advanced proficiency in Python for backend and AI
  development.
- Hands-on experience with cloud services (AWS, Azure).
- Strong knowledge of machine learning, model development,
  deployment, and monitoring.
- Experience building APIs and microservices (FastAPI, Flask,
  or similar frameworks).
- Familiarity with data pipeline architectures, ETL/ELT
  workflows.
- Experience with CI/CD tools and practices (Azure DevOps, AWS
  DevOps, or similar).
- Working experience in some of the following areas:
- - Large Language Models (LLMs) and Generative AI
- - Conversational AI, chatbot development, and dialogue
  systems
- - Search and Recommendation systems
- - Prompt engineering, LLM fine-tuning, and model
  optimization
- - AI agent architectures and orchestration
- Excellent problem-solving, analytical, and communication
  skills.

Preferred Qualifications:

- Experience with MLOps tools (MLflow, SageMaker, Bedrock) and
  workflow orchestration frameworks (Airflow, Prefect).
- Hands-on experience integrating generative AI and
  conversational AI interfaces.
- Knowledge of vector databases and retrieval-augmented
  generation (RAG) architectures.
- Cloud certifications (e.g., AWS Certified Solutions
  Architect, Machine Learning Specialty).
- Experience working in agile, cross-functional teams.

Who You Are:

- Strategic thinker with a passion for building intelligent,
  scalable backend systems.
- Effective collaborator who thrives in dynamic, fast-paced
  environments.
- Committed to continuous learning and staying current with
  emerging AI technologies.
- Detail-oriented and dedicated to delivering high-quality,
  reliable solutions.

Don’t meet every single requirement? We encourage you to
apply anyway. You might be the right candidate for this, or
other roles.

#LI-VG1

Who are we?

At Gartner, Inc. (NYSE:IT), we guide the leaders who shape
the world.

Our mission relies on expert analysis and bold ideas to
deliver actionable, objective business and technology
insights, helping enterprise leaders and their teams succeed
with their mission-critical priorities.

Since our founding in 1979, we’ve grown to 21,000 associates
globally who support ~14,000 client enterprises in ~90
countries and territories. We do important, interesting and
substantive work that matters. That’s why we hire associates
with the intellectual curiosity, energy and drive to want to
make a difference. The bar is unapologetically high. So is
the impact you can have here.

What makes Gartner a great place to work?

Our vast, virtually untapped market potential offers
limitless opportunities – opportunities that may not even
exist right now – for you to grow professionally and
flourish personally. How far you go is driven by your
passion and performance.

We hire remarkable people who collaborate and win as a team.
Together, our singular, unifying goal is to deliver results
for our clients.

Our teams are inclusive and composed of individuals from
different geographies, cultures, religions, ethnicities,
races, genders, sexual orientations, abilities and
generations.

We invest in great leaders who bring out the best in you and
the company, enabling us to multiply our impact and results.
This is why, year after year, we are recognized worldwide as
a great place to work.

What do we offer?

Gartner offers world-class benefits, highly competitive
compensation and disproportionate rewards for top
performers.

In our hybrid work environment, we provide the flexibility
and support for you to thrive — working virtually when it's
productive to do so and getting together with colleagues in
a vibrant community that is purposeful, engaging and
inspiring.

Ready to grow your career with Gartner? Join us.

The policy of Gartner is to provide equal employment
opportunities to all applicants and employees without regard
to race, color, creed, religion, sex, sexual orientation,
gender identity, marital status, citizenship status, age,
national origin, ancestry, disability, veteran status, or
any other legally protected status and to seek to advance
the principles of equal employment opportunity.

Gartner is committed to being an Equal Opportunity Employer
and offers opportunities to all job seekers, including job
seekers with disabilities. If you are a qualified individual
with a disability or a disabled veteran, you may request a
reasonable accommodation if you are unable or limited in
your ability to use or access the Company’s career webpage
as a result of your disability. You may request reasonable
accommodations by calling Human Resources at +1 (203)
964-0096 or by sending an email to
ApplicantAccommodations@gartner.com.

Job Requisition ID:106822

By submitting your information and application, you confirm
that you have read and agree to the country or regional
recruitment notice linked below applicable to your place of
residence.

Gartner Applicant Privacy Link:
https://jobs.gartner.com/applicant-privacy-policy

For efficient navigation through the application, please
only use the back button within the application, not the
back arrow within your browser.

use_cases: Enterprise AI integration with business applications
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves hands-on integration of LLMs and
multimodal models into backend services, implementing MCP
servers for AI agents, prompt engineering, LLM fine-tuning,
and building AI agent architectures. The engineer works
directly on deploying and optimizing AI models, not just
supporting infrastructure for others.
